revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24644718927|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Dainamabuheishushin Shrine (Tajima Province)
| native_name = 大生部兵主神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Dainamabuheishushin Shrine (Tajima Province)
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Dainamabuheishushin Shrine (Tajima Province)'''|大生部兵主神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tajima Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
* {{ill|Q134917286|ltq=Q134917286|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Tajima Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Tajima Province|ja|但馬国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11381626|1=List of Shikinaisha in Tajima Province}}
** Series ordinal: 45
** P155: {{ill|Q11364695|ltq=Q11364695|qid=Q11364695|1=Nakashima Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Q135040645|ltq=Q135040645|qid=Q135040645|1=Amukano Shrine}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Tajima Province|lt=Tajima Province|cs|Tadžima (provincie)|de|Provinz Tajima|en|Tajima Province|es|Provincia de Tajima|fa|ولایت تاجیما|fr|Province de Tajima|gl|Provincia de Tajima|id|Provinsi Tajima|it|Tajima (provincia)|ja|但馬国|ko|다지마국|lt|Tadžimos žemė|nl|Tajima (provincie)|pt|Província de Tajima|ru|Тадзима (провинция)|simple|Tajima Province|sk|Tadžima (provincia)|sr|Провинција Таџима|tr|Tajima (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Тадзіма|zh_min_nan|Tazima-kok|zh|但馬國|qid=Q1053727|1=Tajima Province}}
